tools.title: Hourly Rate Calculator
tools.description: Turn annual costs and capacity into a target hourly rate. Includes presets plus import/export and a configurable tax model.

tools.title: Retainer Tier Evaluator
tools.description: Compare retainer packages and discounts, define overage rules, and sanity-check risk and stability trade-offs.

tools.title: Freelancer-ROI-Check
tools.description: Check the ROI of replacing a contributor: model ramp-up productivity loss, mentoring overhead, and delivery risk.
